name: AI_PM_Skills
description: 32 agent-specific PM skills and 12 chained workflows across 5 plugins. For PMs who build, operate, and scale AI agents — from discovery to architecture, execution, monitoring, and knowledge capture.

plugins.name: oracle
plugins.description: Discover which AI agent to build — map automation outcomes to solvable opportunities, validate assumptions, and estimate costs.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Architect scalable AI agent systems — orchestration patterns, multi-agent design, memory architecture, and competitive moats.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Spec and ship AI agents — instruction design, agent PRD templates, prompt engineering, context budgets, and sprint planning.

plugins.name: argus
plugins.description: Measure and optimize AI agent performance — KPIs, reliability, failure analysis, cost tracking, and North Star metrics.

plugins.name: muse
plugins.description: Turn PM tacit knowledge into reusable agent assets — structured knowledge units, decision patterns, and memory management.
